title: Cuneiform Tablet #0637: Neo-Assyrian Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
